CONTENT.Club career: Cissé began his career with the Senegalese club Diambars, having stayed with them from 2008 to 2014. On 18 August 2014, he transferred to France with Louhans-Cuiseaux.
CONTENT.External links: Souleymane Cissé at SoccerwaySouleymane Cissé at National-Football-Teams.comSouleymane Cissé at FootballDatabase.eu
CONTENT.International career: Cissé debuted for the Senegal national team in a 1–0 friendly loss to Mexico on 10 May 2010.

SUMMARY: Souleymane Cissé (born 2 August 1990) is a Senegalese professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Championnat National 2 club Louhans-Cuiseaux.
